examples: You loathe the smell of gas when you are carsick.
They made me carsick from the jiggling and the smell of the fuel.
Feed your pet only lightly before getting in the car -- pets can become carsick.
Cadaques is a good half hour or more carsick-inducing drive over the high hills of Cap de Creus national park with lay-bys for taking photos or calm nervous stomachs.
